refusal_detail: learned million-step and article-class long-horizon traces are explicitly refused until an exact learned long-horizon benchmark bundle exists; 9x9 remains bounded to `IncrementalDecodeWindow` with full-sequence overflow up to 4811021 tokens, and learned Hungarian-v0 remains research-only with `exact_traces=0` and `final_outputs=0`
sudoku_9x9_scope_statement: Full 9x9 sequences still exceed one-pass context by 4366934 to 4811021 tokens, but the canonical learned lane is explicitly re-scoped to bounded `incremental_decode_window` windows with separate early, later, and suffix artifacts instead of pretending flat-prefix fit.
hungarian_v0_verdict: bounded learned Hungarian-v0 lane exists with workload-specific state supervision profile `hungarian_dual_state_reference_v1` and keeps token exactness, state exactness, and final-result exactness separate; compiled Hungarian exactness remains the only promoted closure
replacement_requirement: replace this refusal policy with one exact learned long-horizon benchmark bundle before allowing `learned_article_class`
